prose: The HOMO–LUMO gap of TEMPO has been calculated using density-functional theory (DFT) at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') with the PySCF program. The calculation was performed in the gas phase, with an explicit charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 2. The SCF converged successfully after 12 cycles. The result is a HOMO–LUMO gap of 3.8724203 eV. The input geometry for the computation was taken as-is from the specified file at '/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz'.
